description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The top surface displays a speckled, granite-like texture in shades of red, black, and gray, giving it a robust and decorative appearance. The grooves are deep and sharply defined, creating a series of raised ridges that add both visual and tactile interest. The sides of the block are solid black, contrasting with the textured and colorful top. The block appears dense and heavy, likely intended as a barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. Its design suggests durability and resistance to weathering, suitable for high-traffic or outdoor settings.
description: A rectangular stone block with a grooved, speckled granite top and solid black sides, designed as a durable urban barrier.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the block and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the speckled granite top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the granite texture and black sides visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the grooved granite surface and solid black sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the groove depth and the contrast between the granite top and black sides.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: embedded in concrete or set flush with pavement
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with sharp groove edges.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
